stories.title: 'It's 100 or die': How throwing 100 mph went from a novelty to the norm in MLB
stories.summary: Hitting 100 mph on the radar gun is a badge of honor. Here's why the number of pitchers who have reached it has exploded.

stories.title: Vrabel: I had 'difficult' talks over Russini photos
stories.summary: Mike Vrabel said the Patriots and their fans will get "the best version of me going forward" after the New York Post published photos that appeared to show the coach embracing and holding hands with former Athletic reporter Dianna Russini.

stories.title: Donovan leaves Bulls amid sweeping changes
stories.summary: Billy Donovan has decided to step down as head coach of the Bulls after six seasons.

stories.title: Sources: Soto to return to slumping Mets on Wed.
stories.summary: The Mets, mired in an 11-game losing streak, will get a boost to their offense with outfielder Juan Soto set to return to the lineup Wednesday, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Tomlin joining NBC as studio analyst
stories.summary: Former Steelers coach Mike Tomlin is joining NBC's Sunday night pregame show, "Football Night in America," as a studio analyst, sources confirmed to ESPN.
